description:
What: When the classifier (C1) sees a join cont reached from multiple arms with the same HeapKind, all arms share one caller-allocated dst. No per-arm allocation.

Fixture: case v do :a -> {1,2} ; :b -> {3,4} end (heap-result case; primitive-result cases like int already optimized via RawI64).

Golden CLIF target: zero per-arm alloc_struct; one caller-side alloc; two stores per arm. N arm allocs reduce to 1 caller alloc.

Why: First headline composability win — continuations, destinations, and case all click together.

CLIF impact: strict reduction: (N-1) fewer allocs per case.

Removes: (N-1) tuple allocations per case with N arms.

Tests: new golden CLIF fixture in fixtures/case_tuple_join/.
title: fz-dps.D1: case-arm join into shared dst
